Off Calendar Feb-06-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On May-16-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
DENNIS S. WEAVER, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Paz T. Raguindin
DAN D. KIM, Esq. on behalf of defendants Northpoint Associates/Northpoint Land, LLC, and Wilsey Bennett Co.

The parties indicated that this matter has settled. Terms of the settlement are as follows: Defendants to pay plaintiff the sum of $18,000.00 for settlement of this matter. Dismissal to be filed upon compliance of the terms of the settlement.

Judge Robert L. Dondero; Clerk:Vera Mu; Reporter: JoAnn Bryce, CSR #3321 (206)
